builds_on.name: ReAct
builds_on.evidence: “Recent works such as ReAct [30] ... have demonstrated the feasibility of autonomous decision-making agents that are built on top of a large language model (LLM) core.”

builds_on.name: WebGPT
builds_on.evidence: “Recent works such as ReAct [30], SayCan [1], Toolformer [22], HuggingGPT [23], generative agents [19], and WebGPT [17] have demonstrated the feasibility of autonomous decision-making agents”
